title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION COOS FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visiting services that strengthen families and support effective parenting. Aims to help participants achieve both individual and family goals. Family Engagement Specialists can assist with information, resources, and referrals in many areas including basic needs, health, housing, education, safety, parenting. 1855 Thomas Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18, with household income at or below 200% federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 294-0615 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 294-0615 Alternate (458) 710-0903 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the same complex as Coos Health and Wellness and Advanced Health. Services: Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDNET HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING STABILIZATION SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES JUDICIAL SERVICES - COURT APPOINTED SPECIAL ADVOCATES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAST COMMUNITY ACTION COOS
